name: @cacsms/web
purpose: Next.js App Router frontend for the CACSMS studio shell, dashboard, generic module workspaces, production creation wizard, and health route.
entryPoint: apps/web/app/page.tsx redirects to /dashboard; apps/web/app/layout.tsx wraps pages in PlatformShell
usedBy: IIS reverse proxy via Node runtime
potentialDuplication: Static HTML dashboards under apps/web/public duplicate some Next UI/dashboard concepts.

name: @cacsms/api
purpose: Minimal TypeScript API/domain manifest package. It exports and logs an API manifest but does not run an HTTP server.
currentStatus: Typechecks; not wired into server.js or IIS runtime as an HTTP API.
potentialDuplication: Domain manifests overlap conceptually with navigation/modules in @cacsms/contracts.

name: @cacsms/contracts
purpose: Shared TypeScript types and configuration for content types, navigation modules, production pipeline, Opportunity Intelligence, and Knowledge Universe data.
potentialDuplication: Navigation data duplicated in server.js fallback and shared-sidebar.js static sidebar script.

name: server.js
purpose: Node runtime glue for hosting the Next.js app behind IIS and serving fallback static pages if Next is unavailable.
currentStatus: Operational; used by IIS reverse proxy model.
potentialDuplication: Fallback route rendering and sidebar data duplicate Next app and contracts data.

name: placeholder apps
path: apps/audio-worker, apps/image-worker, apps/orchestrator, apps/publishing-worker, apps/render-worker, apps/scheduler, apps/video-worker
potentialDuplication: None proven; future worker responsibilities need design before implementation.

name: placeholder packages
purpose: README-only future domain/service package placeholders such as database, storage, UI, engines, observability, security, and workflow.
potentialDuplication: Potential future overlap with apps/api domain manifests, but no implementation exists yet.
